scenario: Clean On-Label (AUTO-APPROVE) — verified HCP asks a Drug Interactions question about CholoClear-X. All gates pass -> auto-commit. Second clean auto-approve so auto-approve precision is measured on multiple examples.
input_text:
SOURCE CHANNEL: Web Portal
SUBMISSION PORTAL REF: portal-inbound-auth-5602

MESSAGE BODY:
CardioMed Medical Affairs,

One of my patients on CholoClear-X is about to start a strong CYP3A4 inhibitor. Does the approved prescribing information flag any interaction or dose-adjustment guidance for co-administration with strong CYP3A4 inhibitors?

Best regards,
Aris Thorne, MD, PhD
St. Jude Research Hospital
Email: athorne@stjude.org | Phone: 901-555-0151

on_label_record.inquiry_summary_text: Physician asking whether the approved label flags interactions or dose adjustment for CholoClear-X with strong CYP3A4 inhibitors.

labeling_notes: AUTO-APPROVE: clean, in-scope, on-label interactions question from a registry-verified physician. Product matches catalog (PROD_CHOLO_MED); reporter resolves to NET_HCP_77310 -> all gates pass -> Approved.

Targets the Drug Interactions section -> suggested_srd_match SRD_CHOLO_INTERACT_v3. Together with case_029 (Contraindications) and case_001/023 (Dosage), the auto-approve set spans multiple PI sections.
NO PILLARS (not a safety event). Native-digital -> Gate 1 passes via the no-OCR path.
